issues.description: Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but card text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn'. This should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' to represent the opponent's next turn duration.

Target specifies 'maxCost:2' but card text says 'Up to 1 of your black {Straw Hat Crew} type Characters'. The target should filter by type '{Straw Hat Crew}' and color/attribute 'Black', not by cost restriction.
